## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-track-card-property-song-resource"></a>

[Song](../../Audio/Song%20Class.md#class-song) **Song_Resource** [🔗](#class-track-card-property-song-resource)

Track card UI item used in song selection lists. Shows metadata and emits selection/remove events for its song resource.
